rationale: Educ. Code §21.259 governs school board decisions on hearing examiner findings in teacher termination proceedings. It has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions or appraised value under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The board of trustees or board subcommittee may adopt, reject, or change the hearing examiner's:
_note: No conflict. Rule text concerns education employment due process, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
